title: Develop a soil use map for a property
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a soil use map for a property demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Collect information for soil mapping

pcs.text: Confirm soil samples for off-site assessment were collected according to testing agency requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm soil samples for off-site assessment were collected according to testing agency requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm soil samples for off-site assessment were collected according to testing agency requirements.

pcs.text: Collect soil physical, chemical and biological information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect soil physical, chemical and biological information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect soil physical, chemical and biological information.

pcs.text: Determine, from published data and records, the acceptable soil physical and chemical parameters for specified plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine, from published data and records, the acceptable soil physical and chemical parameters for specified plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine, from published data and records, the acceptable soil physical and chemical parameters for specified plants.

pcs.text: Collect information on areas of cultural significance and habitats of biodiversity on the property
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect information on areas of cultural significance and habitats of biodiversity on the property?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect information on areas of cultural significance and habitats of biodiversity on the property.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collate and record research results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collate and record research results.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Collect information for soil mapping

elements.title: Analyse soil information

pcs.text: Classify the soil types of the sample area according to standards for soil classification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Classify the soil types of the sample area according to standards for soil classification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Classify the soil types of the sample area according to standards for soil classification.

pcs.text: Compare collected results with acceptable parameters for land use and production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare collected results with acceptable parameters for land use and production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare collected results with acceptable parameters for land use and production.

pcs.text: Evaluate soil characteristics to determine whether they can be altered to meet land use needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate soil characteristics to determine whether they can be altered to meet land use needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate soil characteristics to determine whether they can be altered to meet land use needs.

pcs.text: Determine the Readily Available Water (RAW) values for irrigation sites
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the Readily Available Water (RAW) values for irrigation sites?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the Readily Available Water (RAW) values for irrigation sites.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Analyse soil information

elements.title: Plot topography and soil survey data on property map

pcs.text: Interpret results from analysed data and add to property map
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret results from analysed data and add to property map?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret results from analysed data and add to property map.

pcs.text: Identify potential uses of the soil for purposes of land classing, land capability, areas of cultural significance and habitats of biodiversity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential uses of the soil for purposes of land classing, land capability, areas of cultural significance and habitats of biodiversity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential uses of the soil for purposes of land classing, land capability, areas of cultural significance and habitats of biodiversity.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define property boundaries and features?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define property boundaries and features.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify paddocks or irrigation areas?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify paddocks or irrigation areas.

pcs.text: Plot contour or spot level information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plot contour or spot level information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plot contour or spot level information.

pcs.text: Plot soil sampling sites on map
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plot soil sampling sites on map?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plot soil sampling sites on map.

pcs.text: Determine soil profile and irrigation characteristics for each sampling site and irrigation area, and index to the map
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine soil profile and irrigation characteristics for each sampling site and irrigation area, and index to the map?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine soil profile and irrigation characteristics for each sampling site and irrigation area, and index to the map.

pcs.text: Index RAW values for irrigation sites
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Index RAW values for irrigation sites?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Index RAW values for irrigation sites.

pcs.text: Plot areas of specific concern on the map, and index descriptions to the map
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plot areas of specific concern on the map, and index descriptions to the map?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plot areas of specific concern on the map, and index descriptions to the map.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Plot topography and soil survey data on property map

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.
